title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 9–12, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: that was close...!! It'll be no joke if I get hit by him!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: even my bones would be shat- Tered...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This time I won't let him escape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm not used to fighting with only one Katana, but I have no choice...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch scratch

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: OH NO! ZORD CAN'T HANDLE THEM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He can't counter with two people attacking him!! I'm going to help him!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
